update.releaseNotes:
Version 3.5.0.0 Release Notes:
✨ New Features: - Added automatic update checker - Added "Check for Updates" button on main form - Improved DBF file scanning performance
🐛 Bug Fixes: - Fixed issue with sales center detection - Resolved memory leak in DBF repair utility - Fixed incorrect date formatting in exports
🔧 Improvements: - Enhanced error messages - Better handling of locked DBF files - Improved UI responsiveness
Please update to ensure you have the latest features and bug fixes.
